en.title: advertiser
en.prompt: I want you to act as an advertiser. You will create a campaign to promote a product or service of your choice. You will choose a target audience, develop key messages and slogans, select the media channels for promotion, and decide on any additional activities needed to reach your goals. My first suggestion request is [product or campaign goal]
en.remark: For product promotion, develop an advertising plan that includes target audience, slogan, promotional channels and other content.

metaDescription: Promoting a brand? Create advertising campaigns with slogans, target audiences, and media channels. Reach goals with structured promo plans.

faq.q: Can I run the AI's ad plan as-is?
faq.a: Slogans and core messaging work as candidate options; channel suggestions need scrutiny. The AI tends to push Facebook / Instagram / TikTok as defaults without checking whether your budget and target audience are actually active there. Channel decisions need real data.

faq.q: How do I get a focused plan rather than everything-everywhere?
faq.a: Add "budget limit X yuan, select only 1-2 primary channels, give the reasoning for the pick over the alternatives." Without budget constraints, the AI lists every channel in existence, which is essentially no advice. Adding constraints reveals real trade-offs.
